purpose: finalise candidate criteria, definitions and scenario vignettes
instrument: expert information sheet; conflict declaration; pilot survey
feedback_or_analysis: pilot comprehension review; no criterion scores used as evidence
stopping_or_progression_rule: progress only after ambiguous terms are repaired

instrument: rating items plus open-text additions for criteria, screens and interactions
feedback_or_analysis: median, interquartile range and thematic additions returned anonymously
stopping_or_progression_rule: revise/drop items according to predeclared agreement and relevance rules

instrument: bounded weight allocation, mandatory-screen rating and threshold-vignette tasks
feedback_or_analysis: controlled feedback with group medians, dispersion and anonymised reasons
stopping_or_progression_rule: retain items meeting consensus; carry uncertain items to sensitivity-only status

instrument: re-rate disputed criteria and case vignettes after feedback
feedback_or_analysis: test rating stability and document residual disagreement
stopping_or_progression_rule: stop after planned final round or earlier if all mandatory constructs reach consensus
